name: Tranquility
text:
After another allied unit within 2 of this unit Rallies, but before its Make Actions step, you may exhaust this card. If you do, roll a number of white defense dice equal to this unit's [courage]. For each [block] and [surge] result rolled, this unit and the allied unit remove 1 Suppression token.
When you would exhaust this card, you may instead discard it. If you do, roll red defense dice instead of white defense dice when resolving this card's effect.
